name: intentional-fastapi

metadata.name: intentional-fastapi
metadata.summary: Plugin that lets you interact with your Intentional bots through a FastAPI-based REST API interface

documentation:
# Intentional - FastAPI REST API

[![Made for Intentional](https://img.shields.io/badge/made_for-intentional-blue)](https://intentional-ai.github.io/intentional/docs/home/)
[![PyPI - Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/intentional-fastapi.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/intentional-fastapi)
[![PyPI - Python Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/pyversions/intentional-fastapi.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/intentional-fastapi)
[![Copier](https://img.shields.io/endpoint?url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/copier-org/copier/master/img/badge/badge-grayscale-inverted-border-orange.json)](https://github.com/copier-org/copier)

Plugin that lets you interact with your Intentional bots through a FastAPI-based REST API interface

-----

## Table of Contents

- [Installation](#installation)
- [License](#license)

## Installation

```console
pip install intentional-fastapi
```

## License

`intentional` is distributed under the terms of the [AGPL](LICENSE.txt) license. If that doesn't work for you, [get in touch](mailto:github@zansara.dev).

modules.name: intentional_fastapi
documentation: FastAPI REST API interface for Intentional.

modules.name: intentional_fastapi.bot_interface
documentation: FastAPI REST API interface for Intentional.

classes.name: intentional_fastapi.bot_interface.ResponseChunksIterator
documentation: Async iterator that collects the response chunks from the bot and streams them out.

classes.name: intentional_fastapi.bot_interface.FastAPIBotInterface

methods.name: intentional_fastapi.bot_interface.FastAPIBotInterface.run
documentation: Chooses the specific loop to use for this combination of bot and modality and kicks it off.

methods.name: intentional_fastapi.bot_interface.FastAPIBotInterface.handle_response_chunks
documentation: Stream out text messages from the bot through a TextChunksIterator.

methods.name: intentional_fastapi.bot_interface.FastAPIBotInterface._run_text_messages
documentation: Runs the interface for the text turns modality.

methods.name: intentional_fastapi.bot_interface.FastAPIBotInterface._run_audio_stream
documentation: Runs the interface for the audio stream modality.
Bot that lets you use a FastAPI REST API to interact with the user.
